name: LendingPool

methods.name: create
methods.desc: Initialize the pool. Called once at deployment.

methods.name: set_loan_manager
methods.desc: Set the authorized LoanManager app ID. Admin-only.

methods.name: set_escrow
methods.desc: Set the RepaymentEscrow app ID. Admin-only.

methods.name: set_paused
methods.desc: Emergency pause/unpause. Admin-only. Halts new disbursements.

methods.name: deposit
methods.desc:
Deposit ALGO into the pool.
The lender must include a PaymentTransaction to this app address as a preceding transaction in the atomic group. Shares are minted pro-rata.

methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc:
Withdraw ALGO by burning shares.
Enforces 7-day lock period from last deposit.

methods.name: disburse
methods.desc:
Disburse ALGO to a borrower. LoanManager only (inner app call).
Enforces utilization cap at 90%.
Uses arc4.Address (32-byte raw address) instead of ABI Account type so that inner application calls from LoanManager work correctly — the ABI Account type (uint8 index) cannot be used across inner calls because the callee cannot resolve the caller's accounts array.

methods.name: return_funds
methods.desc:
Return repaid ALGO to the pool. Called by RepaymentEscrow
as part of the repayment split.

methods.name: get_utilization_bps
methods.desc: Current utilization rate in basis points.

methods.name: get_deposit
methods.desc: Get deposit record for a lender. Reverts if not found.

methods.name: get_share_value
methods.desc: Calculate the ALGO value of a given number of shares.

desc:
Single unified ALGO lending pool.

    Access control:
        - deposit / withdraw: any KYC-verified lender
        - disburse: LoanManager contract only (inner app call)
        - return_funds: LoanManager / RepaymentEscrow (inner app call)
        - admin methods: admin only

sourceInfo.errorMessage: invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
